title: 信息日报 2026-07-04

headline.title: Anthropic与三星洽谈定制AI芯片，挑战OpenAI与博通联盟
headline.summary: 据消息，Anthropic正与三星讨论开发定制AI芯片，此举距OpenAI宣布与博通合作仅一周。若达成协议，将加剧AI芯片领域的竞争。
headline.title_en: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
headline.summary_en: Anthropic is reportedly in discussions with Samsung to develop a custom AI chip, coming about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip partnership with Broadcom. If finalized, the deal would intensify competition in the AI chip market.
headline.original_title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
headline.reason: 这是AI芯片军备竞赛的最新动态，直接关系到未来大模型基础设施的成本与性能，对产业格局有重大影响。
headline.reason_en: This is the latest move in the AI chip arms race, directly impacting the cost and performance of future LLM infrastructure, and has significant implications for the industry landscape.
